residual_risks: Live GitHub repository settings remain external proof: Allow auto-merge, workflow token write permissions, branch protection/rulesets, required reviews, and merge queue behavior cannot be proven by local plan review.
A workflow_run workflow only triggers after the workflow file exists on the default branch; the implementation PR must not rely on the new workflow to self-merge.
After implementation, the currently open PR auto-merge check must report external GitHub setting blockers separately from local implementation failures.
Post-implementation evidence must include actual command results and tracked durable evidence before PR readiness is claimed.
